name: Street Slickers
author: Poki
description: Get ready to win races and make some cash in Street Slickers - an exiting sandbox action game that lets you explore a massive world. There are many ways for you to earn cash on your way to becoming a legend of the streets, like participating in races and fighting in a zombie arena. If you're looking for a way to spend your hard-earned money, you can buy a variety of vehicles like cars, tanks, helicopters, or even spaceships! Are you ready to become a king of the streets? How do I play Street Slickers? Use the mouse to aim. Move: WASD or Arrow keys Sprint: Shift Interact: F Jump: Spacebar Shop: T Respawn: R Who created Street Slickers? Street Slickers is created by Art Games. Play their other games on Poki: Inside Job , Ooze Odyssey , and Samsara ! How can I play Street Slickers for free? You can play Street Slickers for free on Poki. Can I play Street Slickers on mobile devices and desktop? Street Slickers can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets. Can I play Street Slickers with my friend? Yes! Street Slickers is a multiplayer game so you can play online with your friends!
